description_long: This rifle features a compact, streamlined design with a matte black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a wooden or wood-textured stock and pistol grip. The stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support, while the pistol grip is angled for comfortable handling. A detachable box magazine is inserted vertically in front of the trigger guard, and the barrel is of standard length, ending with a simple muzzle. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel and receiver for aiming. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and wood, typical of mid-20th-century submachine guns or carbines.
description: A compact rifle with a matte black metal body, wooden stock and grip, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's shape and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, trigger, and the wooden elements of the stock and grip.
